commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Say, Thus says the Lord GOD; Shall it prosper. shall he not pull up its roots, and cut off its fruit, so that it withers. it shall wither in all its leaves of spring, not requiring great power or many people to pluck it up by its roots. Will God countenance perfidy. (Calmet) "Faith must be kept even with enemies. Jerome) Arm. The conquest did not cost the Chaldeans much. Sedecias fled by night, but was soon taken, 4 Kings xxv.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
